content.cn_text: J:得了吧，马可。我们得赶快为巴克利教授把这个项目整理好。
content.en_text: J: Come on Marco. We've got to get on and sort out this project for Professor Barclay.

content.cn_text: M:等一下。我想确保我们得到了所有的信息。现在......我们在哪里?
content.en_text: M: Hang on. I want to make sure we've got all the information. Now …… where are we?

content.cn_text: J:嗯，今天我们需要弄清楚我们要做什么，以及我们要如何划分工作。
content.en_text: J: Well, today we need to sort out exactly what we're going to do and how we're going to divide the work up.

content.cn_text: M:好吧。顺便问一下，我们还有多少时间?
content.en_text: M: OK. How long have we got, by the way?

content.cn_text: J:嗯，学期结束是4月6日，他说要在第八周交，所以最迟是3月25日，因为那一周的开始是21日。所以时间不长!
content.en_text: J: Um… the end of term is April 6th and he said to hand it in on week 8, so that's March 25th at the latest because the beginning of that week is the 21st. So not long!

content.cn_text: M:对的。你拿到笔记了吗?
content.en_text: M: Right. Have you got the notes there?

content.cn_text: J:是的，他想让我们做一个小规模的研究，就像上次一样，关于企业是否给员工提供了更多的福利。我们现在必须考虑老年工人的增加。应该相当简单。
content.en_text: J: Yes, he wants us to do a fairly small-scale study, like the last one, on whether or not businesses were offering more benefits to staff. We've now got to look at the rise in older workers. Should be fairly straightforward.

content.cn_text: 男:是的，只要我们保持小规模。谁在做标记?
content.en_text: M: Yeah, as long as we keep it small. Who's marking it?

content.cn_text: J:不知道，有时候他会让博士生帮他批改。
content.en_text: J: Don't know – sometimes he gets the PhD students to mark it for him.

content.cn_text: M:哦，实际上这里只写着“高级讲师”。我想巴克利教授要把它们都做一遍未免太过分了。
content.en_text: M: Oh actually it just says here 'a senior lecturer'. I suppose it's too much for Professor Barclay to do them all.

content.cn_text: J:是的。不管怎样，我们要怎么做呢?
content.en_text: J: Yeah. Anyway, how are we going to go about this?

content.cn_text: 男:嗯，我们必须决定我们想要多大，我们是谁……
content.en_text: M: Well, we have to decide how big we want it to be and who we're…

content.cn_text: J:是啊，但是我想我们必须为这个项目制定一个时间表，否则什么事也做不成。
content.en_text: J: … Yeah, but I think we must sort out a timetable for the project otherwise nothing will get done.

content.cn_text: M:好吧。你想这么做吗?
content.en_text: M: OK. Do you want to do that?

content.cn_text: J:好的。这里一结束我就去做。
content.en_text: J: Alright. I'll do it as soon as we finish here.

content.cn_text: 男:好的，我们现在要为这个项目做些什么?最好的办法是什么?嗯，卡特教授建议我们成立一个焦点小组，进行一些深入的采访，但我想那要花很多时间。
content.en_text: M: OK – what do we have to do now for the project? What's the best way to go about it?Um… well, Professor Carter suggested we set up a focus group to get some in-depth interviews but I think that'll take a lot of time.

content.cn_text: J:是的，我同意。如果我们做了一个焦点小组，我们就得花时间决定把谁包括进去，反正也没必要。
content.en_text: J: Yeah, I agree. If we did a focus group, we'd have to spend time deciding who to include in it and it's not necessary to do one anyway.

content.cn_text: 男:哦，好吧。
content.en_text: M: Oh, fine.

content.cn_text: J:如果你同意，我想我们应该和卡特教授给我们的名单上的企业联系一下，问问他们是否准备参加。
content.en_text: J: And, if you agree, I think we should get in touch with the businesses on the list Professor Carter gave us and ask them if they're prepared to participate .

content.cn_text: 男:听起来不错，然后我们可以去那里，给他们问卷，然后再收。
content.en_text: M: Sounds good – then we can go there, give them questionnaires and collect them later.

content.cn_text: 珍:没错。
content.en_text: J: Exactly.

content.cn_text: M:好吧。那么我们是否需要在图书馆预订一间自习室，这样我们就可以一起输入数据了?也许不是，我想我们中的一个人就能解决这个问题。
content.en_text: M: OK. Then do we need to book one of those study rooms in the library so we can work together to input the data? Perhaps not, as I guess just one of us could just sort it out,actually.

content.cn_text: J:是的，那样就容易多了。我们做的很多事情都是定性的，所以我们会写下来，而不是统计数据。恐怕没有这样的软件!，
content.en_text: J: Yes, that would be easier. A lot of what we're doing is qualitative, so it'll be writing up rather than statistics. No software for that I'm afraid! ,

content.cn_text: 男:我认为如果我们有一些员工的真实照片会更好看，因为我们把外表作为就业能力的一个因素，不是吗?
content.en_text: M: And I think it would look better if we had actual shots of some of the staff because we're citing appearance as a factor in employability, aren't we?

content.cn_text: J:是的。好的。当我今晚解决所有问题时，我会把这些都考虑进去的。
content.en_text: J: Yeah. OK. I'll factor that all in when I sort everything out tonight.

content.cn_text: M:我很高兴我们决定一起工作。我想会很顺利的。
content.en_text: M: I'm glad we decided to work together. I think it's going to work out well.

content.cn_text: J:是啊，考虑到我们在这个项目上必须结对工作，我想我们选择彼此是对的。我们在学术上互补，因为我们都擅长对方所不擅长的!事实上，我们之前就应该试着一起工作!
content.en_text: J: Yes, well, given that we had to work in pairs on this project, I think we were right to choose each other. We complement each other academically as we're each good at what the other isn't! In fact, we should have tried working together before!

content.cn_text: M:是的!现在，我们该如何分配工作呢?我来做分析，好吗?
content.en_text: M: Yes! Now, how shall we split the work? I'll do the analysis, shall I?

content.cn_text: J:哦，好的。
content.en_text: J: Oh – OK.

content.cn_text: M:只是可能会更快，因为我已经习惯了——尽管你的英语比我好。我需要更多的阅读练习，真的。
content.en_text: M: It's just that it might be faster because I'm used to doing it – although your English is better than mine. I need more practice at reading, really.

content.cn_text: J:好的。然后我来做报告。如果你不介意的话?
content.en_text: J: OK. I'll do the presentation then. If that's OK with you?

content.cn_text: 男:当然可以。我不介意在公众面前演讲，但我讨厌为他们准备所有的笔记。
content.en_text: M: Yeah, sure. I don't mind speaking in public but I hate preparing all the notes for them.

content.cn_text: J:问题是，导师说应该一个人来做整个报告，他说他希望我来做，因为我还没有做过报告。
content.en_text: J: Thing is, the tutor said one person should do the whole presentation and he said he expected me to do it because I haven't done one yet.

content.cn_text: 男:不，没关系。现在…
content.en_text: M: No, that's fine. Now…

groups.desc:
Questions 21-24
Complete the sentences below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect:
Jenna and Marco must complete their project by $13430$
The project will be a study of the increase in $13431$
The project will be assessed by $13432$
Jenna and Marco agree they need a $13433$ for the project.

items.analysis: 这道题的关键在于理解项目提交的时间线。虽然学期结束是4月6日，但教授要求在第8周提交，即3月25日之前。这里需要注意几点：1) "hand it in"是"complete their project"的同义表达，表示提交项目；2) "at the latest"意味着这是最后期限；3) 3月25日是第8周的最后一天，因为那周开始于3月21日。所以，正确答案是March 25th，这是他们必须完成项目的最后期限。在听力中，我们常常需要从多个日期中找出正确的答案，这就要求我们不仅要听清楚日期，还要理解上下文中的逻辑关系。

这道题的关键在于理解题干中的"increase in"与原文中的"rise in"是同义表达。原文中明确提到"We've now got to look at the rise in older workers"，这直接对应了题目要求填写的内容。"older workers"正是研究项目关注的对象，表示老年工人或年长员工的增加趋势。这个短语既符合题目要求的不超过三个词的限制，又准确描述了研究的主题。其他提到的内容如"benefits to staff"或"small-scale study"虽然也在对话中出现，但并不是这个特定研究项目的焦点。因此，"older workers"是最准确、最符合题意的答案。

这道题的关键在于准确理解对话中提到的评估者信息。文中首先提到PhD学生可能会批改作业，但随后Marco纠正说实际上是"a senior lecturer"。这个信息直接对应了题目中的"assessed by"。作为老师，我想强调以下几点：1) 要注意听力中的转折和更正信息，如"Oh actually"这样的表达往往引出更准确的信息；2) 熟悉学术环境中的职位名称很重要，如"senior lecturer"是一个具体的职位；3) 要学会区分对话中提到的多个可能选项（如PhD学生、Professor Barclay），并选择最终确认的答案。记住，在听力考试中，最后提到的相关信息通常是最准确的。

这道题的答案是"timetable"。在听力原文中，Jenna明确表示他们需要为项目制定一个时间表（timetable）。这个词直接出现在原文中，而且与题干中要求的"Jenna and Marco agree they need a [   ] for the project"完全吻合。选择"timetable"作为答案是因为它准确反映了对话中提到的内容，表示他们需要一个明确的时间安排来完成项目。此外，"timetable"这个词在上下文中是最合适的，因为它特指为某个活动或项目制定的时间安排表，这正是Jenna和Marco在讨论的内容。记住，在听力考试中，当你听到原文中直接出现的、符合题意的词时，通常就是正确答案。

groups.title: What THREE things do Marco and Jenna have to do now for the project?

collect_options.title: What THREE things do Marco and Jenna have to do now for the project?

list.title: F
list.content: do some work in the library

items.analysis: 根据对话内容，Marco和Jenna需要为项目完成三件事：发放问卷（B选项），联系企业（C选项），以及拍摄员工照片（D选项）。这三项任务都在对话中被明确提到并得到了双方的同意，因此是他们现在需要为项目完成的事情。

groups.desc:
Questions 28-30
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: Why did Jenna and Marco agree to work together?

options.title: A
options.content: because they both wanted to work with someone

options.title: B
options.content: because they each have different skills

options.title: C
options.content: because they have worked together before

items.analysis: Jenna和Marco同意一起工作的原因是他们各自拥有不同的技能。原文中Jenna明确表示他们在学术上互补，每个人都擅长对方不擅长的领域。这直接对应了选项B中提到的"different skills"（不同的技能）。这种互补性显然是他们决定合作的主要原因，因为它能使他们的团队工作更加高效和全面。

items.title: Why does Marco suggest that he writes the analysis?

options.title: A
options.content: He needs more practice with this kind of writing.

options.title: B
options.content: He is better at English than Jenna.

options.title: C
options.content: He has more experience of this than Jenna.

items.analysis: Marco提出自己来写分析部分的原因是他更有经验。他说"It's just that it might be faster because I'm used to doing it"，这表明他习惯于做分析工作，因此能更快完成。这直接对应了选项C "He has more experience of this than Jenna"。Marco的这个陈述清楚地表明他在进行分析方面比Jenna更有经验，因此能更高效地完成这项任务。

items.title: Why does Jenna offer to do the presentation?

options.title: A
options.content: Her tutor wants her to do the presentation.

options.title: B
options.content: Marco is very nervous about giving presentations.

options.title: C
options.content: She wants to divide the work on the project fairly.

items.analysis: 文中Jenna明确表示她的导师期望她做这个演讲。她说："导师说应该由一个人做整个演讲，他说他期望我来做，因为我还没做过。"这直接回答了为什么Jenna要做演讲的问题。导师的要求是她承担这个任务的主要原因，而不是因为Marco不愿意或为了公平分工。
